description: Load the US macroeconomic dataset 'usa.gdt' containing 'gdp' and 'inf'. Create a new variable 'g_gdp' representing the annualized quarterly growth rate of Real GDP using the formula 400 * diff(log(gdp)). Generate a dual-axis time series plot comparing 'g_gdp' on the left axis and 'inf' on the right axis. Save the plot as a PNG image to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/growth_inflation_plot.png and as a Gnuplot script to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/growth_inflation_plot.plt.
